readme.current_age: Simulation start age. Year 1 = this age + 1. All age-gated logic (RMD, Roth conversion window, tira_age_gate) is relative to this.
readme.birth_year: Used ONLY to determine SECURE 2.0 RMD bracket (pre-1951 vs post-1950 thresholds). Does not drive simulation year counting.
readme.assumed_death_age: Last simulation year. Simulation runs from current_age to this age.
readme.filing_status: Options: 'MFJ' (married filing jointly), 'single', 'MFS' (married filing separately), 'HOH' (head of household). Drives federal/state tax brackets.
readme.spouse: Optional. Include only if filing_status is MFJ. sole_beneficiary_for_ira: true enables spousal rollover RMD rules.

beneficiaries.primary: First to inherit. share_percent values must sum to 100.
beneficiaries.contingent: Inherit only if all primary beneficiaries predecease. share_percent must sum to 100.
beneficiaries.eligible_designated_beneficiary: true = can use own life expectancy for RMDs (e.g. disabled, chronically ill, minor child, <10 yrs younger). false = 10-year rule applies.
beneficiaries.per_stirpes: true = if this beneficiary predeceases, their share passes to their descendants.

rmd_policy.extra_handling_options: What to do with RMD amounts above what is needed for living expenses. Options: 'reinvest_in_brokerage' (park surplus in taxable account), 'spend' (treat as extra income), 'hold_cash' (keep as cash reserve)

roth_conversion_policy.window_years: List of year ranges e.g. ['now-75', '1-10']. 'now' = current_age. Conversions only happen within these windows.
roth_conversion_policy.keepit_below_max_marginal_fed_rate_optio: Options: 'fill the bracket' (convert up to top of current bracket), a rate string like '22%' (stop before hitting that marginal rate), or 'none' (no cap).
roth_conversion_policy.avoid_niit: true = do not convert if it would trigger the 3.8% Net Investment Income Tax surcharge.
roth_conversion_policy.rmd_assist_options: Options: 'convert' (use pending RMD to top up Roth conversion room), 'none' (treat RMD independently).
roth_conversion_policy.tax_payment_source_options: Options: 'BROKERAGE' (pay conversion tax bill from taxable account), 'withhold' (withhold from conversion amount — reduces Roth benefit).
roth_conversion_policy.irmaa_guard: enabled: true = cap conversion to avoid crossing IRMAA Medicare premium tier thresholds.
